data.content: Implementation review rejected: alias display exists only in beat-detail-lightbox.tsx. Four views still missing alias support: (1) beat-columns.tsx shows stripped IDs, not aliases; (2) dep-tree.tsx shows stripped IDs for dependency links — critical since aliases define relationships; (3) retakes-view.tsx shows stripped IDs in retake rows; (4) cascade-close-dialog.tsx shows stripped IDs in descendant list. The backend data pipeline is correct (normalizeAliases in knots-backend.ts, aliases field on Beat type). Each view component needs to accept and render aliases — the getDisplayedBeatAliases helper from beat-detail-lightbox.tsx can be reused. All quality gates pass (tests green, tsc clean, build succeeds, lint errors are pre-existing).
